hero.title: The smart
hero.subtitle: for your 3D printer
hero.description: Label filament spools with NFC tags or QR codes, connect Spoolman, and access thousands of slicer profiles—all in one app.

nfc.title: Write tags – in seconds
nfc.intro: Whether NFC chip or printed QR code, Spool Tag Propus supports both methods. All relevant filament data is securely stored in standardized formats.

features.title: OpenSpool-Format
features.description: The open NDEF standard format for Filament NFC tags. Compatible with Bambu Lab and others.

features.title: OpenPrintTag-Format
features.description: Extended format with even more data points – for maximum compatibility with all slicers.

features.title: QR-Code-Fallback
features.description: No NFC? No problem. Print out a QR code and attach it directly to the spool.

features.title: Read tags & import files
features.description: Read existing tags or upload and process spool JSON files directly.

features.title: Everything you need for smart filament management

slicer.title: Download slicer profiles
slicer.description: Download slicer profiles for Bambu Studio, PrusaSlicer, and OrcaSlicer directly from the app. Filter by material, printer, or manufacturer—one click is all it takes.

drying.title: Drying profiles
drying.description: Allow your filament to dry properly. The integrated drying profiles show you the optimal temperature and duration for each material.

backup.title: Backup & Recovery
backup.description: Export your settings as a JSON file and import them on another device. Automatic server backups keep your data safe.

admin.title: Multi-user with admin panel
admin.description: Assign/revoke multiple user accounts, admin rights, lock accounts, and monitor system status—all via the built-in admin panel.

sprache.title: Multilingual & PWA
sprache.description: The interface is available in German, English, and Dutch. As a progressive web app, you can install Spool Tag Propus like a native app.

how.title: 4 steps to smart filament management
how.subtitle: Simply open it in your browser and get started—no installation required.

steps.title: Open & get started
steps.description: Open Spool Tag Propus in your browser and optionally install it as an app (PWA) – no app store required. If you want to host it yourself: Docker Compose in just a few minutes.

steps.title: Login & connect
steps.description: Create your account, optionally enter your Spoolman URL, and all your spools will be automatically synchronized.

steps.title: Select filament & create tag
steps.description: Search the database for your filament, adjust the color and temperatures, and write the data to an NFC tag or QR code.

steps.title: Scan & print
steps.description: Hold your smartphone up to the Tag – your printer will automatically recognize the filament. Download slicer profiles directly and get started.

database.title: 10,000+ profiles – instantly searchable
database.intro: The built-in filament database contains profiles from all major manufacturers. All data is updated daily and available offline.

features.title: Full-text search
features.description: Search by manufacturer, material, color, or temperature range—results appear immediately.

features.title: Download Slicer Profiles
features.description: One click is all it takes: download ready-made profiles for Bambu Studio, OrcaSlicer, or PrusaSlicer directly.

features.title: Automatic synchronization
features.description: The database synchronizes daily in the background with the official sources.

compatibility.title: Works with your setup
compatibility.intro: Spool Tag Propus integrates seamlessly into existing 3D printing workflows and supports all common standards.

admin.title: For the entire Makerspace
admin.intro: Spool Tag Propus supports multiple user accounts—ideal for makerspaces, schools, or teams. Admins retain full control.

features.title: Account Management
features.description: All accounts in one overview. Block, delete, or assign admin rights—directly in your browser.

features.title: System status
features.description: API version, DB size, number of profiles, and sync status at a glance.

features.title: Backup overview
features.description: All user backups in one place – with timestamp and user assignment.

features.title: Error reports with screenshots
features.description: Users can report bugs directly from the app—including screenshot attachments.

items.question: Is Spool Tag Propus free?
items.answer: Yes, Spool Tag Propus is completely free and open source. You can use it directly in your browser—or optionally host it yourself on your server, NAS, or Raspberry Pi.

items.question: Which NFC tags are supported?
items.answer: Standard NDEF-compatible NFC tags are required (NTAG213/215/216). These are available at low cost from Amazon or AliExpress. NFC writing and reading only works on Android devices with the Chrome browser, as iOS does not support the NFC Web API.

items.question: How do I install Spool Tag Propus?
items.answer: Simply open the URL in your browser – done. If you want to host it yourself: installation via Docker Compose. You can find a ready-made `docker-compose.yml` in the repository. With a single command, the frontend (Nginx) and backend (Python/Flask) are ready to use – even on Synology NAS, UGREEN NAS, or a Raspberry Pi.

items.question: Does the app work without internet access?
items.answer: Yes! As a Progressive Web App (PWA) with Service Worker, all core functions—including the Filament database—can be used offline. Only database updates and Spoolman sync require a network connection.

items.question: Can I use Spool Tag Propus on my cell phone?
items.answer: Yes! The app is fully mobile-optimized and can be installed as a PWA on Android and iOS. NFC tag writing/reading is available on Android with Chrome. QR code scanning works on all devices with a camera.

items.question: How is my data stored?
items.answer: All data is stored locally in an SQLite database on your own server. No data is transferred to external services (unless you enable GitHub issue creation for bug reports).

items.question: Is there a difference between OpenSpool and OpenPrintTag?
items.answer: Both are open NFC standards for filament tags. OpenSpool is simpler and focuses on basic material data (manufacturer, material, color, temperatures). OpenPrintTag is an extended format with additional parameters such as flow ratio, maximum volumetric speed, and more—ideal for advanced setups.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Get started now — free, open source, and usable directly in your browser.

spoolman.mixedContentWarning: ⚠️ The app runs over HTTPS but Spoolman uses HTTP. The browser blocks this connection. Solution: make Spoolman accessible via HTTPS (e.g. Cloudflare Tunnel) or open the app locally over http://.

about.title: ℹ️ About Spool Tag Propus
about.beta: ⚠️ BETA — This project is under active development
about.description: is an open-source filament tag manager for 3D printers. Create, read and manage NFC tags and QR codes for your filament spools — compatible with
about.feature1Desc: Write NFC tags directly from your phone (Android Chrome) with filament data in OpenSpool (JSON) or OpenPrintTag (CBOR) format. Compatible with Bambu Lab, OrcaSlicer and all OpenSpool-capable printers.
about.feature2Desc: Generate QR codes with your filament data for printing and sticking on spools. Scan QR codes with the camera to load data instantly — works on all devices.
about.feature3Desc: Browse over 13,000 color variants from 126+ brands from the Open Filament Database. Select a filament and create a tag directly.
about.feature4Desc: 4,000+ filament profiles for OrcaSlicer and Bambu Studio — automatically synced from GitHub. Download profiles directly, filtered by brand, material and printer.
about.feature5Desc: Connect to your Spoolman instance, browse your spool inventory and import filament data directly into a tag.
about.feature6Desc: Recommended drying temperatures and times for 20+ materials — from PLA to PEEK. With moisture sensitivity and notes.
about.feature7Desc: 45 predefined filament colors. Materials and variants are automatically filtered to the selected brand (e.g. Bambu Lab shows only their materials).
about.feature8Desc: Installable on your phone's home screen. Works offline for tag creation and drying profiles.
about.feature9Desc: Toggle via the button in the top right. Your setting is saved.
about.platformDownloadVal: All browsers — write file to tag with NFC Tools app (iOS & Android)
about.platformShareVal: Mobile browsers with Web Share API
about.supportTitle: Like Spool Tag Propus? Support the development!
about.supportHint: Every contribution helps keep Spool Tag Propus growing.
